principle: Physical consolidation must not collapse epistemic authority.

fidelis-contracts.role: neutral shared serialization and identity contracts

aconstellation.role: legacy integration architecture retained for reconciliation; no final authority

meaning-assay.role: significance, warrant, and BELARION candidate qualification

attest-agent-conlang.role: typed inter-agent envelope and verification seam

forbidden_authority_collapses: receipt validators importing substantive ethical or warrant scoring
enforcement redefining upstream ethical or warrant findings
attest verification upgrading adapter provenance without independent evidence
